title: Warhammer: Vermintide 2

notes: Needs the "temporary_launcher_workaround" from the beta tab. First run will often give you a "connection_timeout", but thereafter, the game plays normally. EAC will kick you out of any online games, but many of the missions can be played through "custom games" with bots. Performance is excellent. If it wasn't for EAC, I suspect this would be a near-platinum experience.

title: Warhammer: Vermintide 2

cpu: AMD Ryzen 3 2200G with Radeon Vega Graphics
notes: Is a must to opt in the "temporary_laucher_workaround - bypass laucher" beta and always select "bypass laucher" when opening the game. Is possible to run the game with no lauch options, but it will have absurd frame rate drops (from 40 to 7) that not always come back to normal, setting the "PROTON_USE_WINED3D11=1 %command%" lauch option resolved the frame rate drops. And have a consistent gameplay. About the online not even an one lobby is listed to join, while steam stats show that are more than 6k players online at the time of the test.
title: Warhammer: Vermintide 2

cpu: AMD Ryzen 3 2200G with Radeon Vega Graphics
notes: Is a must to opt in the "temporary_laucher_workaround - bypass laucher" beta and always select "bypass laucher" when opening the game. Is possible to run the game with no lauch options, but it will have absurd frame rate drops (from 40 to 7) that not always come back to normal, setting the "PROTON_USE_WINED3D11=1 %command%" lauch option resolved the frame rate drops. And have a consistent gameplay. About the online not even an one lobby is listed to join, while steam stats show that are more than 6k players online at the time of the test. At the end of every mission the game closes with a server error (https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=1829289897) and no progress is saved beyond the prologue.
title: Warhammer: Vermintide 2

notes: It can run fine but you can't even host a private game
